english translation text: Here we show our humbleness and weakness to Allah and surrender to Allah.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Prostrating before You are my body and my shadow
and my heart is in full faith of You

arabic text: هذِهِ يَدَايَ وَمَا جَنَيْتُهُ عَلَى نَفْسِي
english translation text: These are my two hands and this is what I have committed against myself,
Oh the All-great: You are hoped for all enormous things;
Please, forgive me my serious offences

arabic text: فَإنَّهُ لا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ الْعَظِيمَ إلاَّ الرَّبُّ الْعَظِيمُ.
english translation text: because none can forgive the serious sin except the All-great Lord.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
